interactions.summary: Jiang answers the Iran-dream question by saying he has not been to Iran, but war may now make many children fantasize about growing up to fight Americans.

PBD pivots to COVID and asks about China’s state narrative. Jiang says COVID has been memory-holed in China, then gives his own view that it was an American-funded gain-of-function bioweapon released in Wuhan while Chinese narratives emphasize U.S. responsibility and downplay China’s role.

speaker_notes.note: SPEAKER_01 is Patrick Bet-David or the PBD side of the interview; SPEAKER_00 is Jiang except for brief intro/audio fragments. Diarization is treated as a hint and the exchange context controls attribution.

claims.claim: Jiang says the war may create a generation of Iranian children who want to fight America because U.S. strikes killed civilians and schoolgirls.
He says COVID has been memory-holed in China: people avoid talking about a traumatic three or four years and prefer to move on.
He presents his own belief that COVID was an American-funded gain-of-function bioweapon released in Wuhan, while Chinese narratives downplay China’s role.
claims.temporal_scope: Personal claim stated 2026-04-07; controversial and source-internal.

signature_moments.moment: COVID is not debated in China; it is memory-holed after trauma, as if public silence is the only way to continue.
signature_moments.source_phrase: COVID has been memory holed in China
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It sharply captures state memory and social exhaustion after lockdown.

signature_moments.moment: The early disease image is furnace lungs: a biological and political story where the body burns before the narrative hardens.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is the packet’s most vivid and troubling image, while requiring careful attribution as Jiang’s claim.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang’s description of China’s post-COVID silence: traumatic experience erased from ordinary public conversation.

chronology_notes.note: Jiang distinguishes what Chinese state-aligned narratives say about COVID from his own belief, both stated in this April 2026 interview.
